channel.title: Fitness on Apoorva Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Fitness on Apoorva Sharma

item.title: traininglogs
item.description: A Python pipeline that parses free-text training session logs into a structured NoSQL/JSON schema. Includes dataclass models, a CLI, and an agent layer for AI-assisted log intake.

item.title: Progressive Overload Is Not Just Adding Weight
item.description: Weight on the bar is one variable. Here are the others.

item.title: Building traininglogs: A Python Pipeline for My Gym Data
item.description: How and why I built a parser that turns my messy training notes into structured JSON.

item.title: Building a Sustainable Training Habit
item.description: How I stopped chasing short-term results and started optimising for repeatability.

item.title: The Deload Week: What It Is and Why Most People Skip It
item.description: A planned reduction in training load is not laziness. It is how you keep accumulating progress over months.

item.title: What to Eat When Training for Strength
item.description: Nutrition for strength training is simpler than the industry wants you to believe.

item.title: Sleep Is a Training Variable
item.description: You cannot out-train poor sleep. Treating it as optional is a mistake most lifters make for years.

item.title: Why I Started Running (After Years of Avoiding It)
item.description: I spent years treating cardio as optional. Here is what changed my mind.
